content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based strength: Nifty +0.53%, Realty +2.92%, Metal +0.86%, Pharma +0.87%, Energy +0.69% all green. VIX easing slightly to 18.36. Sector rotation favoring rate-sensitive (realty, NBFC) and defence/capital goods on PSU re-rating theme. Bank Nifty modestly higher; IT lone laggard. Book is well-positioned with 10 names already and ~52% deployed — focus this tick is position management, not new admissions.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24290
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.2%, CMP 1046.40. Per trail mandate (a)+(b): unrealized > +4%, lock SL above breakeven. Current SL 1035 already above entry 984. Trail to 1030 (-1.6% from CMP, satisfies 0.5% trail-gap discipline) — slightly looser to give room post the Q4 +11% pop without surrendering profit. Wait — 1030 is BELOW current 1035, that loosens SL which is rejected. Correcting: keep SL at 1035 (no MODIFY needed). Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY: 1030 < 1035 stored, would be rejected. Current SL 1035 is already locked above entry 984 (+5% gain protected). CMP 1046.40, SL 1035 = 1.1% buffer — tight but acceptable given consolidation pattern post 11% Q4 rally. Target 1110 intact (+6% headroom). Hold as-is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.2%, CMP 122.36, SL 119 (-2.7% buffer). Defensive hedge. Gold in mild consolidation but Goldman target $4000/oz mid-2026, Fed cuts ahead, INR weakness supports. SL 119 is close to support 121.53 — let it run; this is the portfolio's volatility hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 23.85 = current SL. No-op MODIFY rule says don't emit. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4: PAT +23%, AUM crossed Rs 5L cr milestone. Today +3.03% to 958.20. SL 950 is at breakeven (entry 944), already locked. CMP 958, SL 950 = 0.86% buffer — within trail-gap discipline. Target 990 (+3.3%). Let the Q4-beat momentum run; no MODIFY since SL already at locked-in breakeven and tightening further would risk premature stopout on intraday wobble."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1700.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.5%, hit intraday high 1748.60 (+2.9%) before fade to 1722.50. Q4 beat (rev +26%, 500MMT cargo milestone, dividend Rs 7.5), Jefferies upgrade. Currently SL 1715. Tightening SL down to 1700 would LOOSEN — REJECTED. Correcting: raise SL to 1715... no, that's the same. Need new SL > 1715 but < CMP 1722.50 with 0.5% gap. 1722.50 × 0.995 = 1714 max. Cannot tighten further without violating trail-gap. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override: stored SL 1715 already at breakeven (entry 1700). CMP 1722.50, gap to SL = 0.44% — already at the edge of trail-gap discipline. Tightening further risks self-stopout on normal pullback from 1748 high. Q4 beat thesis intact; let target 1790 work. Note: governance overhang (SEBI/DRI on Adani group) remains — already priced into entry decision."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4%, CMP 1538.30. High-volume day (4.2x ADV) faded from 1590 open to 1538. Made fresh 52w high at 1590.80 then reversed — distribution candle. SL 1510 = -1.8% buffer. Concerning: Internal Audit head resignation effective May 16 just after May 14 results board — governance flag. Q4 binary on May 14. Hold to SL but flag — if breaks 1530 intraday, would consider exit. Currently above support."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.9%, CMP 13519. Gapped up to 13976 then faded sharply (shooting star intraday). April record sales 2.39L (+35% YoY domestic), Q4 op profit record, Rs 140 dividend. SL 13400 = -0.9% buffer, very tight. Auto sector +0.48% but stock specifically faded. Risk: if breaks 13510 (today's low) on volume, SL hits soon. Holding but close to risk tolerance. Q4 already out, no binary risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7%, CMP 208.14. Massive 8.2x ADV volume, intraday 212.66 high, slight fade. Q4 beat (PAT +68% YoY), ICICI/SBI MF stake-up RBI-approved. SL 204 = -2% buffer. Strong trend, high-volume breakout from yesterday's 198 close. Target 220 intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.1%, CMP 4576.10. Strong +5.16% recovery day on defence cluster bid post BHEL Q4. New CMD effective May 1. SL 4480 = -2.1% buffer. Tejas Mk-1A IAF review in May is binary risk — flagging for monitoring. Target 4790 intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 495.00,
      "new_target": 540.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9%, CMP 510.95. Realty +2.92% sector leader; ANANTRAJ +4.08%. Stored SL 488 (-3.5% from CMP). Tightening SL to 495 (-3.1% from CMP, above entry 506? no, 495 < 506 so still below entry). Raises SL by Rs 7 (1.4% tighter), gap to CMP 3.1% — well within trail-gap discipline. Genuine tightening, not no-op. Q4 results May 11 binary — flagged for next session disposition. Target 540 unchanged."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 already locked above entry; tightening further would self-stopout on normal chop. Target 1110 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL 119 below recent support. Let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 23.85 already at breakeven+. Sun Pharma May 19 binary upcoming — monitor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 950 at breakeven; Q4 momentum running. Don't choke the winner."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 already at breakeven; gap to CMP only 0.44% — at trail-gap limit, can't tighten further without self-stopout risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Reversal off 52w high on high volume is concerning; May 14 results binary plus internal audit head resignation. Will reassess if 1530 breaks."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL 13400 (-0.9%); shooting star fade from 13976 to 13519. If breaks today low 13510, expect SL hit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "High-volume Q4 breakout intact; Hold to target 220."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defence momentum recovering; Tejas Mk-1A IAF review is May binary risk to monitor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 495.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 488 to 495 on realty sector leader strength; still below entry, gap 3.1% within discipline. Q4 results May 11 — binary risk to manage in coming sessions."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL (+12% on Q4 beat) and BAJAJ-AUTO (+6.5%, May 6 buyback announcement) are interesting but extended into binary events — no entry today. SYNGENE earnings miss (-19% PAT YoY) made stock rally on relief, not fundamentals — avoid. KOTAKBANK -5% post results worth watching for stabilization next 2-3 sessions. CESC, LAURUSLABS, MANAPPURAM held off — power cluster cap, valuation, and SEBI warning respectively.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 52% deployed across 10 positions — well diversified across NBFC (PNBHOUSING, BAJFINANCE), banking (BANDHANBNK), auto (MARUTI), capital goods/defence (HAL), realty (ANANTRAJ), services/ports (ADANIPORTS, GESHIP), pharma ETF (PHARMABEES), gold ETF (GOLDBEES). No new entries today — most candidates extended or facing binary events within 3 sessions. Today's P&L +0.92% with realized +Rs 4,747. Focus: protect existing winners' SLs at breakeven where possible; GESHIP and MARUTI are the two stress points to watch — both have tight SLs and faded intraday. ~Rs 487K cash gives ample dry powder if Tuesday brings cleaner setups."
}
